title: DeliveryStream
description: An Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream.

DeliveryStreamName.description: The name of the delivery stream.

DeliveryStreamARN.description: The ARN of the delivery stream.

DeliveryStreamStatus.description: The status of the delivery stream.

DeliveryStreamType.description: The type of the delivery stream.

CreateTimestamp.description: The date and time the delivery stream was created.

LastUpdateTimestamp.description: The date and time the delivery stream was last updated.
